section:
KTN::PLWatcher Class Reference KTN::PLWatcher
The PLWatcher class is responsible for monitoring the profit and loss of a trading algorithm.
#include <PLWatcher.hpp>
Inheritance diagram for KTN::PLWatcher:
Public Member Functions
PLWatcher (AlgoInitializer p)
Constructs a new PLWatcher object.
virtual ~PLWatcher ()
Destroys the PLWatcher object.
virtual void onJson (std::string json)
Processes a JSON-formatted string.
virtual void onLaunch (std::string json)
Triggered when the algorithm is launched.
virtual void onCalculate ()
Performs calculation logic for the algorithm.
void onMktData (int index) override
Handles market data updates.
void onTrade (int index, double price, double size, int aggressor) override
Handles a trade event.
void minOrderExecution (KTN::OrderPod &ord, bool hedgeSent) override
This method is called when a minimum order execution is received.
virtual void Enable (bool bEnable)
Enables or disables the algorithm.
void ResetPosition () override
Resets the algorithm's position.
void Print () override
Prints information about the algorithm instance.
void ToggleCommand (int id) override
Toggles a specific command by ID.
void Restart () override
Restarts the algorithm.
virtual void onPL (Position &pos, ProfitEvent event)
This method is called when a profit or loss event occurs.
void onEngineJson (EngineCommand &cmd)
Processes algo engine-specific commands.
void OrderReceived (KTN::Order &incoming, int index) override
Processes received order events.
void OrderMinUpdate (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
Processes updates for an order. OrderMin is a minimal order object.

Constructs a new AlgoBaseV3 object.

Returns the globally unique identifier (GUID) of the algorithm.

Polls the system for events.

Handles session heartbeat events.

Handles session status updates.
void onSpreadLegOrderExecution (KTN::Order &ord)
Executes spread leg orders.
virtual void minOrderAck (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
This method is called when a minimum order acknowledgement is received.
virtual void minOrderCancel (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
This method is called when a minimum order cancellation is received.
virtual void minOrderModify (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
This method is called when a minimum order modification is received.
virtual void minOrderReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
Handles order rejection events.
virtual void minOrderCancelReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
virtual void minOrderCancelReplaceReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
virtual void onHedgeOrderSent (char *clordid, uint64_t reqid, int32_t secid, KOrderSide::Enum side, uint32_t qty, int32_t price9, uint16_t instindex)
Handles hedge order sent events.
virtual void onOrderSent (char *clordid, uint64_t reqid, int32_t secid, KOrderSide::Enum side, uint32_t qty, int32_t price, KOrderAlgoTrigger::Enum trig)
Handles order sent events.
virtual void Shutdown ()
Shuts down the algorithm.
virtual void CancelAllOrders ()
Cancels all orders.
void shutdownHandler ()
Shuts down the algorithm handler.
virtual void onMktDataBidAsk (const algomd &md)
Handles bid-ask market data updates.
virtual void onMktDataTrade (const algomd &md)
Handles trade market data updates.

Detailed Description
The PLWatcher class is responsible for monitoring the profit and loss of a trading algorithm.
It inherits from AlgoBaseV3 and AlgoPLCallback classes and provides implementations for various methods. The PLWatcher class is used to track market data, trades, and order execution.
Constructor & Destructor Documentation
PLWatcher() PLWatcherKTN::PLWatcher KTN::PLWatcherPLWatcher

Constructs a new PLWatcher object.
Parameters
p
The AlgoInitializer object used to initialize the PLWatcher.
~PLWatcher() ~PLWatcherKTN::PLWatcher KTN::PLWatcher~PLWatcher

Destroys the PLWatcher object.
References PLMonitor::Stop().
Member Function Documentation

void KTN::PLWatcher::Enable (bool bEnable)[virtual]
Enables or disables the algorithm.
Parameters
bEnable
A boolean indicating whether to enable or disable.
Implements KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
minOrderExecution() minOrderExecutionKTN::PLWatcher KTN::PLWatcherminOrderExecution
void KTN::PLWatcher::minOrderExecution (KTN::OrderPod & ord, bool hedgeSent)[override], [virtual]
This method is called when a minimum order execution is received.
Parameters
ord
The order details.
hedgeSent
Indicates whether a hedge order was sent.
Reimplemented from KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References KTN::OrderPod::exchordid, KTN::OrderPod::lastpx, KTN::OrderPod::lastqty, OrderManagerV5::minOrderExecution(), KTN::OrderPod::OrdSide, and KTN::OrderPod::secid.

The engine command to process.
Reimplemented from KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References PLMonitor::AdjustRisk().
onJson() onJsonKTN::PLWatcher KTN::PLWatcheronJson
void KTN::PLWatcher::onJson (std::string json)[virtual]
Processes a JSON-formatted string.
Parameters
json
A JSON-formatted string representing algo parameters.
Note
This is a pure virtual function that must be implemented by derived classes.
Implements KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References instrument::index, RiskBase::MinutesToLive, instrument::mktsegid, OrderParser::parseorder(), instrument::pricemult, RiskBase::ProfitTaking, PLMonitor::Register(), instrument::spreadmult, RiskBase::StopLoss, and instrument::symbol.
Referenced by onLaunch().

Parameters

A JSON-formatted string representing launch data.
Implements KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References algometa::Enabled, onJson(), KtnCmeMdpV4::SetHandleTrades(), and PLMonitor::Start().

onPL() onPLKTN::PLWatcher KTN::PLWatcheronPL
void KTN::PLWatcher::onPL (Position & pos, ProfitEvent event)[virtual]
This method is called when a profit or loss event occurs.
Parameters
pos
The position associated with the event.
event
The type of profit event.
Implements AlgoPLCallback.
References algomd::ask, algomd::bid, AlgoPLCallback::MKT, QuoterV3::NextNew(), OrderManagerV5::onSentOrderFast(), KTN::OrderPod::OrdAlgoTrig, AlgoPLCallback::PROFITTAKE, IExchangeSender::Send(), and AlgoPLCallback::TIMERHIT.

price

size

aggressor

Reimplemented from KTN::AlgoBaseV3.

The order pod containing order details.
